---
title: "Presentations"
format: gfm
editor: visual
---

<!-- if problems adding new pres from other repos, check: https://confluence.atlassian.com/bbkb/fix-error-fatal-no-url-found-for-submodule-path-in-gitmodules-1188400518.html -->

#### Repository to hold presentations

-   [GISRUK 2026: What, Where and How Much ?](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/gisruk2026){target="_blank"}
-   [Software Carpentry : ibis workshop](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/ibis_workshop){target="_blank"}
-   [03/09/2025 : OPSIS Seminar](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/seminar){target="_blank"}
-   [Global Spatial Indexes review and applications](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/global_indexes){target="_blank"}
-   [Overture roads workflow with duckdb](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/overture_roads){target="_blank"}
-   [Interpolating global economic activity data](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/down_scaling){target="_blank"}
-   07/09/2023: [FOSS:4G](https://ischlo.github.io/presentations/foss_pres){target="_blank"}
